case_title: CHASE BANK USA N.A. A CORPORATION VS. FRED K LIN et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT FRED K. LIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FRED K LIN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN.
